QF.id: Introduction to AML, CFT and Proliferation Financing_7

question.text: India became a member of the Financial Action Task Force (FATF) in which year?

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** India became a member of FATF in 2010. India is also a member of two FATF-Style Regional Bodies (FSRBs) — the Asia Pacific Group (APG) and the Eurasian Group of Combating Money Laundering and Financing of Terrorism (EAG).
**The Trap:** 2002 is when PMLA was enacted. 2005 is when PMLA came into force (July 1, 2005). These dates are commonly confused with India's FATF membership year.
**Cross-Exam Context:** FATF membership is a sovereignty and compliance milestone. In NISM exams, remember the trinity: PMLA enacted 2002, PMLA enforced 2005, India joined FATF 2010.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** FATF conducts Mutual Evaluations of its members. India's compliance with FATF recommendations directly impacts our country's global financial reputation and cross-border transaction scrutiny.
